subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of Names and Creator of heaven! I beseech Thee by the leaves of the Divine Lote-Tree and its fruits and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء اسئلک باوراق سدره المنتهی و اثمارها و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @nearness and remoteness
